name: soda-straw
description: Connect to the Soda Straw MCP and promote sessions into persistent agents

api_endpoint.title: Soda Straw endpoint
api_endpoint.description: Base URL of your Soda Straw instance (no trailing slash)

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Personal API token. Generate one under Settings > API tokens in the Soda Straw UI.
